title: Capture orderbook + mark + model inputs + decision per discovery loop for replay
objective: Durably capture the inputs and outputs of every discovery loop so alternate configs can be replayed offline against real historical state.
required_work: 1. Audit existing runtime/ob_snapshots/ and recommendation_api model input fields.
2. Build core/replay_capture.py writing JSONL to runtime/replay_captures/YYYY-MM-DD.jsonl.
3. Wire capture call into the main loop at the point decisions are made.
4. Capture record includes ts, loop_id, event_slug, registry_match, orderbook, mark, model_inputs, model_output, discovery_decision.
5. Provide a sample file with >= 5 records from a live short run.
acceptance_criteria: New capture file appears during a short live run
At least 5 records captured and documented
All model input fields the model actually uses are captured
Zero modifications to model or decision logic
verification: Paste analysis of existing ob_snapshots and whether its content is superseded or merged
